——GGDB Vstar Series Update

GGDB Vstar Couple Series Dirty Sneakers

Launched in 2014 by the founder, the Vstar series draws design inspiration from the SUPER-STAR but features a simpler structure. It blends classic casual style with 70s rock vibes. This globally popular series offers exceptional comfort and versatility, making it a standout in footwear.

Key features:
- Bordered toe design
- Retro yet fresh style, suitable for all seasons
- White canvas with a distressed look for a trendy, versatile appearance
- Considered one of the most comfortable "dirty" sneakers
- Wrapped sole design
- High-quality, attractive materials ideal for various occasions
- Inner lining made of terry cloth for breathability and sweat absorption, perfect for barefoot summer wear
- Each pair is handmade and uniquely distressed
